entries.source: "Ask me questions about this poem"
entries.value: "I weydii su'aalo ku saabsan tan gabay"

entries.source: "Help me understand this paragraph"
entries.value: "Iga caawi understand tan faqradda"

entries.source: "Summarize chapter 2"
entries.value: "Soo koob chapter 2"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Reading Companion on inspir for communication learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Hage wax ku ool ah oo ku saabsan isticmaalka Wehelka Akhriska gudaha inspir si loo barto Somali: communication, oo leh prompts, wareegyo waxbarasho, iyo caadooyin AI oo ammaan badan.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: ka xooggan wareeg waxbarasho

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: la qabso session si kaaga yool.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Macallin AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay yar koowaad step rather ka badan jawaab kama dambays ah.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: weydii AI si hubi kaaga reasoning, ma just result.

entries.source: Communication
entries.value: Isgaarsiin

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish by qoraal fikrad back ka yimid xusuus.

entries.source: Learners exploring communication topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Ardayda sahaminaya mawduucyada isgaarsiinta ee raba hage wax ku ool ah halkii ay ka heli lahaayeen sanduuq jawaab guud.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts si isku day

entries.source: Read, summarize, and question texts.
entries.value: akhri, soo koob, iyo su'aal texts.

entries.source: Reading Companion
entries.value: Saaxiibka Akhriska

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Wehelka Akhriska qaab waxbarasho AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Bring qoraal ama buug fikrad iyo dhis comprehension iyada oo loo marayo summaries, eray-bixin, inference, iyo discussion.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Wehelka Akhriska qaab waxbarasho AI: hage wax ku ool ah

entries.source: Start the live mode at Reading Companion. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Vocabulary Builder. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Ka bilow qaabka tooska ah ee Wehelka Akhriska. Haddii aad rabto qaab waxbarasho oo u dhow, isku day Dhisaha Eray-bixinta. Si aad aragti ballaaran uga hesho madasha, akhri waxa wehel waxbarasho AI uu qof walba u qaban karo.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: bilow leh tusaale Prompts.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell qaab waxa aad waa trying si baro ama produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: taas difference shows up gudaha flow. halkii ee hal giant response, ugu fiican sessions move iyada oo loo marayo loop: set yool, isku day something, get jawaab-celin, repair daciif spot, iyo dooro xiga action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: taas focus matters. general chatbot wuu karaa jawaab almost anything, laakiin qaab waxbarasho siiyaa wada-hadal shape. taas nudges aad toward kind ee thinking, tababar, jawaab-celin, ama sahan taas caawisaa fikrad stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: tan waa isku mid caado behind studying leh AI iyadoo aan khiyaano lahayn yourself: keep arday active. AI waa most waxtar leh marka taas siiyaa aad jawaab-celin ku kaaga thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: tan qaab waa especially waxtar leh loogu talagalay ardayda yaa rabto si:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for reading companion with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Habkan waxaa loo habeeyey saaxiibka akhriska oo leh dhiirigelin u gaar ah, tusaalooyin, iyo habka waxbarashada.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: isku day step gudaha kaaga u gaar ah erayo.

entries.source: Use Reading Companion when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Isticmaal Wehelka Akhriska marka aad rabto kalfadhi si degdeg ah u bilaabma isla markaana adiga kula qabsada. Yoolka koowaad ma aha in la dhawaaqo si cajaa'ib leh. Yoolka koowaad waa in tallaabada xigta laga dhigo mid suuragal u muuqata.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: waxa tan qaab caawisaa leh

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: halkee si go xiga

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: aad wuu karaa also bilow leh rough version ee kaaga dhab ah problem. messy koowaad prompt waa fine. session wuu karaa clarify heer, dhagaystayaal, waqti kama dambays ah, iyo style once aad begin.
